log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE executable, likely a spreader with an overlay. Get more information about the types of IOCs (Indicators of Compromise) available in the report.
The sample dropped one file and created one process. Investigate the network activity to see if there are any suspicious IP addresses or DNS queries.
The sample communicated with an IP address 103.129.99.25 over port 443. Investigate the process activity to see what the process did and what modules it loaded.
The process pdfmarks.exe was created, but there are no notable modules loaded or API calls highlighted. Investigate the registry changes to see if there are any persistence mechanisms.
There are no persistence keys set, but the sample set some other registry keys. Investigate the dropped files to see what was written to disk.
The sample dropped a file pdfmarks.exe in the Temp directory. Investigate the capabilities of the sample to see if there are any suspicious techniques used.
The sample is packed with Mpress, which is a known packing tool. This could be a technique used to evade detection. Investigate the execution chain to see how the sample was launched.
